description: Smooth and sophisticated, the Beckham Signature deodorant spray for men has fruity and woody undertones. This spray has base notes of amber, patchouli and sandalwood, peppered with fresh grapefruit and cardamom accents. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
